log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Elf — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).

REASONING: HP CRITICAL (10/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Elf — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
